CustomField.description: Summary of Callout work item execution status with executed/failure counts.
CustomField.formula: IF(TotalCalloutsPlanned__c = 0, "", IF(TotalCalloutsPlanned__c = TotalCalloutsProcessed__c && TotalCalloutsExecuted__c = TotalCalloutsProcessed__c, "✅ " & TEXT(TotalCalloutsExecuted__c) & " executed", IF(TotalCalloutsProcessed__c > 0 && TotalCalloutsExecuted__c = 0, "❌ " & TEXT(TotalCalloutsProcessed__c) & " failed", IF(TotalCalloutsProcessed__c = 0, "⏸️ " & TEXT(TotalCalloutsPlanned__c) & " planned, not executed", "⚠️ " & TEXT(TotalCalloutsExecuted__c) & "/" & TEXT(TotalCalloutsPlanned__c) & " executed" & IF(TotalCalloutsProcessed__c - TotalCalloutsExecuted__c > 0, " (" & TEXT(TotalCalloutsProcessed__c - TotalCalloutsExecuted__c) & " failed" & IF(TotalCalloutsPlanned__c - TotalCalloutsProcessed__c > 0, ", " & TEXT(TotalCalloutsPlanned__c - TotalCalloutsProcessed__c) & " not executed)", ")" ), IF(TotalCalloutsPlanned__c - TotalCalloutsProcessed__c > 0, " (" & TEXT(TotalCalloutsPlanned__c - TotalCalloutsProcessed__c) & " not executed)", "" ) ) ) ) ) )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Summary of Callout work item execution status.
CustomField.label: Callout Summary
